feed.title: Harshabrat - publications
feed.subtitle: Hi 👋, I'm a CS student who enjoys exploring technology and learning new things. I share projects, write about what I'm currently working on, and occasionally blog about life and whatever happens to be on my mind.

entry.title: AmbedOntoS: Large Scale Ontology Synthesis for Ambedkar and Peace Studies
entry.summary: A published research work on large-scale ontology synthesis for Ambedkar and Peace Studies, presented in the International Conference on Data Science, Computation and Security.
